creator: strongswan@Nanoteq.com
text:
Created attachment 150096
strongswan update 5.2.0 -> 5.2.1 diff file

Updated strongSwan to version 5.2.1
 - Removed files/patch-src__libhydra__plugins__kernel_pfroute__kernel_pfroute_net.c this patch have been included in 5.2.1 source code.
 - Changed TOOLS option to separate options for PKI  utilities, and SECP (Simple Certificate Enrollment Protocol) options

 - See https://wiki.strongswan.org/projects/strongswan/wiki/Changelog52 for details on changes in strongSwan 5.2.1.
